title: Teeth Steroid Extraction for Steroid Profiling in Human Primary Teeth
author: Ruolan S. Wu
materials: Remove all reagents from 4C or -20C and allow to come toroom temp

steps.title: Put 5 1
steps.instruction: Put 5 1.4mm beads in a 2mL Bead ruptor tube

steps.title: Label bead ruptor tubes
steps.instruction: Label bead ruptor tubes

steps.title: Label 0
steps.instruction: Label 0.6mL polypropelene microcentrifuge tubes tocorrespond with bead ruptor tubes

steps.title: Label LC-MS/MS vials to corresond with...
steps.instruction: Label LC-MS/MS vials to corresond with bead ruptor tubes andput glass inserts in vials

steps.title: Make enough 1X I
steps.instruction: Make enough 1X I.S. to use for this asay

steps.title: Rinse all 12x75mm Fisher culture tubes...
steps.instruction: Rinse all 12x75mm Fisher culture tubes needed for experimentwith 1mL MeOH, vortex for 2sec, dump MeOH waste into waste beaker, add another1mL MeOH to each tube, vortex for 2 sec, dump MeOH into waste and placeinverted tubes in tube rack in drying oven at 60C

steps.title: Label rinsed and dried culture tubes
steps.instruction: Label rinsed and dried culture tubes

steps.title: Cover all rinsed, dried and labelled...
steps.instruction: Cover all rinsed, dried and labelled tubes (right-side up)with aluminum foil ensuring complete covering of tubes

steps.title: Wash all teeth to remove saliva and blood
steps.instruction: Wash all teeth to remove saliva and blood

steps.title: Retrieve the cleaned pieces of three...
steps.instruction: Retrieve the cleaned pieces of three teeth from the drawerand record the weight

steps.title: Crush each piece into powder with the tooth crusher
steps.instruction: Crush each piece into powder with the tooth crusher

steps.title: Collect and weigh the powder
steps.instruction: Collect and weigh the powder

steps.title: Put all tooth powder into corresponding bead ruptor tube
steps.instruction: Put all tooth powder into corresponding bead ruptor tube

steps.title: Add 10ul STD to appropriate bead ruptor tubes
steps.instruction: Add 10ul STD to appropriate bead ruptor tubes

steps.title: Add 1mL room temp HPLC ACN to all tubes
steps.instruction: Add 1mL room temp HPLC ACN to all tubes

steps.title: Add 50ul I
steps.instruction: Add 50ul I.S. to all tubes excpet BLKBLK

steps.title: Add 50uL of 50% MeOH to BLKBLK
steps.instruction: Add 50uL of 50% MeOH to BLKBLK

steps.title: Vortex 2sec
steps.instruction: Vortex 2sec

steps.title: Centrifuge at 16,100g for 5min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 16,100g for 5min

steps.title: Remove 1000ul supernatant (94%) and put in 12x75mm culturetube
steps.instruction: Remove 1000ul supernatant (94%) and put in 12x75mm culturetube

steps.title: Add 500ul Hexane to all samples
steps.instruction: Add 500ul Hexane to all samples

steps.title: Vortex 5sec
steps.instruction: Vortex 5sec

steps.title: Centrifuge at 3200g for 2min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 3200g for 2min

steps.title: Remove hexane and put in waste
steps.instruction: Remove hexane and put in waste

steps.title: Dry ACN at 60C for 45min
steps.instruction: Dry ACN at 60C for 45min

steps.title: Resuspend in 55ul 25% MeOH
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 55ul 25% MeOH

steps.title: Vortex 5 sec
steps.instruction: Vortex 5 sec

steps.title: Centrifuge 3200g for 1min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 3200g for 1min

steps.title: Transfer all supernatant to 0
steps.instruction: Transfer all supernatant to 0.6mL centrifuge tube

steps.title: Centrifuge 16100g for 2min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 16100g for 2min

steps.title: Transfer 50ul supernatant to LC insert using gel loadingtips
steps.instruction: Transfer 50ul supernatant to LC insert using gel loadingtips

steps.title: Store in -20C until injection
steps.instruction: Store in -20C until injection
